message:
chore: stop tracking .beads/.bv.lock (now in .gitignore)

This file is the bv (beads_viewer) process lock — it changes every time
bv starts and contains only the current PID and timestamp. It should
never have been tracked. Now that it's in .gitignore, untrack it so
future bv invocations don't create dirty state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
